description_long: This cabin features a broad, multi-faceted roof with a combination of sloped metal and shingle surfaces, creating a dynamic geometric profile. The exterior walls are primarily dark with contrasting lighter panels and are set atop a brick foundation, giving the structure a sturdy, grounded appearance. A spacious wraparound porch with wooden railings and steps is present on the front and one side, partially covered by the roof's overhang and supported by visible posts. The cabin includes a mix of window sizes, with a prominent rectangular window on one side and smaller windows distributed asymmetrically. The main entrance is accessed via a central staircase leading up to the porch, and the overall design blends rustic and modern elements. Architectural details such as exposed beams, horizontal slats, and a mix of materials contribute to its distinctive urban cabin character.
description: A modern rustic cabin with a multi-angled metal and shingle roof, brick foundation, wraparound porch, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central staircase, main entrance, and the wraparound porch with supporting posts and railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long porch, horizontal slats, and a large rectangular window beneath the sloped roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid wall with minimal openings and the full expanse of the sloped roof.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizes the geometric roof pattern and the porch's extension along the side.
attribute_roof_type: multi-faceted gable and shed roof with metal and shingle surfaces, featuring overhangs and exposed beams
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical distribution with one large rectangular window on the side and several smaller windows scattered across the facade
attribute_door_placement: single main door centered on the front facade, accessed via porch steps
